title: Record a Run
gpsBanner: Tracked by GPS — distance, time and elevation are filled in. Add a type and notes, then save.
watchBanner: Imported from your watch via Health Connect — check the details (there's no route/map), pick a type, then save.

import.title: Import an activity file
import.gpx: <0>GPX / TCX:</0> one activity with its route map — export from Garmin Connect, Strava and most platforms
import.zepp: <0>Zepp CSV:</0> Profile → Privacy Center → Export Personal Data
import.strava: <0>Strava CSV:</0> Settings → My Account → Download or Delete → Request Archive
import.noRuns: No runs found in that file.
import.alreadyImported_one: Already imported — that run is in your log.
import.alreadyImported_other: Already imported — those runs are in your log.

fields.notesPh: How did it feel? Any aches?

hrPendingNote: Heart rate will be added automatically from {{store}} once your watch syncs (usually a few minutes) — leave these blank, or enter them yourself.
